text: I find myself wandering through these dim, almost silent halls. The emptiness of the glass-walled room and the sterile, angular design evoke a sense of isolation and anticipation. The second scene comforts me with its color—a vibrant R+D wall glowing against the darkness, hinting at creativity and possibility amidst the shadowy space. I am both observer and participant here, curious and cautious, feeling the tension between innovation and loneliness, duty and discovery.
